---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the learning system, UI, providers, or documentation
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem should this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## Learning Or Vision Impact

How does this improve memory, review quality, provider support, evaluation, privacy, or user control?

## Local-First Impact

Does this work without hosted providers? If not, what is the free/local fallback?

## Risks

List possible privacy, safety, accuracy, or complexity risks.
